Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Great Ones]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== Of Dawn and Darkness ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 3''' — The Sleepless must consult the Great Ones.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 10''' — Servants of the Great Ones must be able to tolerate the dark.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 12''' — A new Emperor's reign was arranged by the Great Ones.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 12''' — The Great Ones set up an attack that scarred the sky.}}

== Of Kings and Killers ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 3''' — The Great One once spoke to Jyrine.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 19''' — The Great Ones speak to Jerri through dreams.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 20''' — Great Ones may inhabit human bodies to complete their work.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 20''' — The Great One is waiting for Jerri's response.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 22''' — The Great One will break the chains.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 26''' — The Great One ended a long time ago.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
